✦ Our Story

About FitHUb

Born from personal transformation, built to change lives — Ahmedabad's trusted wellness destination.

Where Busy Lives Find Balanced Wellness

Welcome to FitHUb Nutrition Center, located in the heart of Supercity Bhadaj, Ahmedabad. We proudly deliver a complete wellness experience that transforms Body, Mind & Soul.

We believe that wellness isn't just about weight loss — it's about unlocking your highest potential physically, mentally, and emotionally. Our goal is to help you live a healthier, more fulfilling life, no matter how busy your schedule may be.

We don't believe in shortcuts or "one-size-fits-all" plans. Every individual is unique, and so should be their wellness journey — customized care, constant motivation, and a community that feels like family.

Lives Transformed
10+

✦ The Founders

Meet the Visionaries

Founder & Wellness Coach
Mitesh Patel
workspace_premium 10+ Years Experience
A passionate health educator who turned his own health crisis into a mission to transform lives. Mitesh battled early-stage lifestyle disorders caused by corporate stress and transformed through structured nutrition and fitness. Today, he leads FitHUb's mission with expertise in nutrition, fitness, body composition, and behavioral change — reaching clients across multiple countries.
2000+
Lives Transformed
10+
Yrs Experience
3+
Countries
Co-Founder & Wellness Coach
Trupti Mitesh Patel
workspace_premium 9+ Years Experience
Trupti's personal journey is the heart of FitHUb. She overcame Psoriasis, managed weight gain from steroid medications, and bounced back from post-pregnancy challenges — twice. Her story of resilience drives her passion for helping others. Specializing in women's wellness, mindset coaching, face yoga, and meditation, she brings empathy, expertise, and lived experience to every client interaction.

✦ Our Partnership

A Team Built on Love & Purpose

Mitesh and Trupti don't just run a wellness center — they live the mission every day. Their combined personal transformations fuel their passion to help others break free from health challenges and discover their best selves.

Together, they've built a space where science meets compassion, where every client is treated like family, and where real, lasting transformation happens — one life at a time.

✦ Real Results

Transformation Stories

Real people, real results — stories of courage, discipline, and life-changing transformation.

NR
Niranjana Ruparelia
PCOD & Thyroid Recovery
The Struggle
PCOD, thyroid disorder, and hormonal imbalances caused significant weight gain and health deterioration. Feeling defeated and hopeless.
The Transformation
Through FitHUb's holistic approach — nutrition, lifestyle changes, and mindset coaching — achieved remarkable health restoration. Hormones balanced, energy restored.
18 kg
Weight Lost
4 mo
Duration
MB
Mahesh Barot
Diabetic Weight Loss Journey
The Challenge
Type 2 diabetes combined with excess weight and poor dietary habits. Medical team skeptical about weight loss without medication changes.
The Result
FitHUb's diabetic-friendly nutrition plan and workout protocol delivered outstanding results. Doctors amazed by blood sugar control achieved naturally.
24 kg
Weight Lost
5 mo
Duration
PT
Pratik Thakker
Shift Worker Transformation
The Struggle
Shift job schedule and poor food habits caused excess weight gain at a young age, leaving low energy and multiple health issues.
The Transformation
Simple lifestyle changes, nutrition, and FitHUb community guidance transformed everything. Feeling energetic, confident, and living a healthy life again.
20 kg
Weight Lost
3.5 mo
Duration
AP
Aayushi Patel
Healthy Weight Gain Journey
The Challenge
Underweight due to malnutrition and irregular eating habits during hostel life. Low health, low energy, and low confidence.
The Result
Joined FitHUb Community, improved nutrition and lifestyle. Gained weight in a healthy, sustainable way. Now feels confident, strong, and full of energy.
+13 kg

A Husband-Wife Team
Changing Lives Together
